caption: In a spacious indoor hall with warm lighting and ornate chandeliers, several people perform synchronized martial arts movements. The practitioners are dressed in traditional attire, with some wearing blue uniforms and others in white. In the center, a man in white executes a wide, low stance and a sweeping arm motion, shifting his weight and position as the sequence progresses. To his left and right, practitioners in blue uniforms mirror these movements, holding long, thin staffs. In the background, other participants in white and purple attire follow along. As the action unfolds, the man in white transitions from a deep crouch into a more upright posture, extending his arm forward while the others adjust their stances and positions of their staffs. The scene captures a coordinated demonstration of form and technique within a formal event setting.
